plugins.name: US Flag Status
plugins.description: Displays whether the US flag is at full staff or half-staff, with the proclamation reason. Data from the FlagWatch API.
plugins.author: home-screens

versions.changelog: Initial release: US flag half-staff status with SVG visualization, FlagWatch API integration

plugins.name: JSON Data Block
plugins.description: Fetch any JSON API and display it beautifully — single values, lists, tables, card grids, or status boards with per-field formatting and conditional rules.
plugins.author: home-screens

versions.changelog: Initial release: 5 display modes, auto-detect fields, conditional rules, modal config with live preview

plugins.name: Home Assistant
plugins.description: Beautiful entity cards, area grouping, and interactive controls for your Home Assistant instance. Lights, climate, media, covers, locks — no code, no templates.
plugins.author: home-screens

versions.changelog: Visibility conditions panel now lists each entity's possible raw values as click-to-copy chips with the current value highlighted; condition key picker shows sample values per key

Visibility conditions panel in the module config showing each entity's shared-state key (click to copy) and live raw value; debug logging toggle for shared-state publishes; docs clarify that conditions match raw, case-sensitive HA states
Publish entity states to the shared-state bus for conditional widget visibility; new fast-updates lane for near-realtime entity state

Initial release: 8 views (card grid, status board, by area, single entity/row, climate, media, cameras), 15+ domain-aware cards, searchable entity browser with live preview, interactive controls, MJPEG camera streaming with snapshot fallback, local-network permission for LAN HA instances

plugins.name: Celestial Tracker
plugins.description: Beautiful sun and moon tracker with dynamic sky arc, NASA moon photo, real-time celestial data, and dawn/dusk sky tints. No API key required.
plugins.author: home-screens

versions.changelog: Initial release: sky arc with bezier smoothing, NASA moon photo with earthshine, procedural SVG sun, dawn/dusk tints, compact view

plugins.name: Strava
plugins.description: Show your Strava life on the wall: recent activities, weekly and yearly stat tiles, goal rings, a 52-week training heatmap, your latest route, and an athlete card. Strava Subscription Required: Strava only lets subscribers create the free API app this plugin connects through, so you need an active Strava subscription to set it up.
plugins.author: home-screens

versions.changelog: Initial release: 12 views with host-managed Strava OAuth
